creator: vanvan@optima.net.ua
text:
Seting's to Sun mashine
  /etc/dfs/dfstab:
	share -F nfs -o rw=vv.domain,root=vv.domain /usr2
 Run command to FreeBSD mashines :
    mount_nfs sunname:/usr2 /usr/SUN_USR2 
 Answer :                         
    mount_nfs: can't access /usr2: Permission denied :-(
